name: Build and Test on Linux AMD64
on:
  pull_request:
    branches:
     - main
  push:
    branches:
     - main
jobs:
  build-and-test:
    # Ref: https://github.com/actions/runner-images/tree/main/images/linux
    name: build and test on Linux AMD64
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Check out code
        uses: actions/checkout@v3
        with:
          submodules: "true"
      - name: Set up Go
        uses: actions/setup-go@v2
        with:
          go-version: 1.24

      # Prerequisite

      - name: Install Python3 (for Grammar test)
        shell: bash
        run: |
          sudo apt-get update
          sudo apt-get install -y git wget curl make
          sudo apt-get install python3 python3-pip -y
      - name: Install rust nightly toolchain
        uses: actions-rs/toolchain@v1
        with:
          toolchain: 1.91
          override: true
          components: clippy, rustfmt
      - name: Code format check
        run: cargo fmt --check
        shell: bash
      - name: Code clippy check
        run: make lint-all
        shell: bash
      - name: Grammar test
        run: export PATH=$PATH:$PWD/_build/dist/linux/core && make && make test-grammar
        shell: bash
      - name: Runtime test
        run: export PATH=$PATH:$PWD/_build/dist/linux/core && make test-runtime
        shell: bash
      - name: Install KCL CLI
        run: |
          go install kcl-lang.io/cli/cmd/kcl@main
          echo "$(go env GOPATH)/bin" >> $GITHUB_PATH
          echo "${{ github.workspace }}/go/bin" >> $GITHUB_PATH
      - name: Unit test
        run: export PATH=$PATH:$PWD/_build/dist/linux/core && make test
        shell: bash

      - name: KCL Lib GLIBC 2.17 Build and Release
        shell: bash
        run: |
          pip3 install ziglang
          cargo install --locked cargo-zigbuild
          cargo clean
          cargo zigbuild --target x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu.2.17 -r -p kcl-lib
          cp -f target/x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu/release/libkcl.so _build/dist/linux/core
          make release

      - name: Read VERSION file
        run: |
          VERSION=$(cargo pkgid -p kcl-api | cut -d'@' -f2)
          echo "VERSION=v${VERSION}" >> $GITHUB_ENV

      - name: Rename artifact name with version
        run: sudo mv -f _build/dist/linux/kcl-latest-linux-amd64.tar.gz _build/dist/linux/kcl-${{ env.VERSION }}-linux-amd64.tar.gz

      - uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: kcl-${{ env.VERSION }}-linux-amd64
          if-no-files-found: error
          path: _build/dist/linux/kcl-${{ env.VERSION }}-linux-amd64.tar.gz

FROM ubuntu:22.04

ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive

# Install system dependencies
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y \
    git \
    wget \
    curl \
    make \
    python3 \
    python3-pip \
    build-essential \
    pkg-config \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Install Go 1.24
RUN wget -q https://go.dev/dl/go1.24.linux-amd64.tar.gz && \
    tar -C /usr/local -xzf go1.24.linux-amd64.tar.gz && \
    rm go1.24.linux-amd64.tar.gz

ENV PATH="/usr/local/go/bin:${PATH}"

# Install Rust nightly 1.91
RUN curl --proto '=https' --tlsv1.2 -sSf https://sh.rustup.rs | sh -s -- -y --profile default --default-toolchain 1.91 && \
    . $HOME/.cargo/env && \
    rustup component add clippy rustfmt

ENV PATH="${HOME}/.cargo/bin:${PATH}"

WORKDIR /app
COPY repo/ /app/

# Copy and prepare run script
COPY run.sh /run.sh
RUN chmod +x /run.sh

ENTRYPOINT ["/run.sh"]

FROM ubuntu:22.04

ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive

# Install system dependencies
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y \
    git \
    wget \
    curl \
    make \
    python3 \
    python3-pip \
    build-essential \
    pkg-config \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Install Go 1.24
RUN wget -q https://go.dev/dl/go1.24.linux-amd64.tar.gz && \
    tar -C /usr/local -xzf go1.24.linux-amd64.tar.gz && \
    rm go1.24.linux-amd64.tar.gz

ENV PATH="/usr/local/go/bin:${PATH}"

# Install Rust nightly 1.91
RUN curl --proto '=https' --tlsv1.2 -sSf https://sh.rustup.rs | sh -s -- -y --profile default --default-toolchain 1.91 && \
    . $HOME/.cargo/env && \
    rustup component add clippy rustfmt

ENV PATH="${HOME}/.cargo/bin:${PATH}"

WORKDIR /app
COPY repo/ /app/

# Copy and prepare run script
COPY run.sh /run.sh
RUN chmod +x /run.sh

ENTRYPOINT ["/run.sh"]

FROM ubuntu:22.04

ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive

# Install system dependencies
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y \
    git \
    wget \
    curl \
    make \
    python3 \
    python3-pip \
    build-essential \
    pkg-config \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Install Go from package manager
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y golang-go && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Install Rust nightly 1.91
RUN curl --proto '=https' --tlsv1.2 -sSf https://sh.rustup.rs | sh -s -- -y --profile default --default-toolchain 1.91 && \
    . $HOME/.cargo/env && \
    rustup component add clippy rustfmt

ENV PATH="${HOME}/.cargo/bin:${PATH}"

WORKDIR /app
COPY repo/ /app/

# Copy and prepare run script
COPY run.sh /run.sh
RUN chmod +x /run.sh

ENTRYPOINT ["/run.sh"]

    tar -C /usr/local -xzf go.tar.gz && \
    rm -rf /tmp/go-download

ENV PATH="/usr/local/go/bin:${PATH}"

RUN curl --proto '=https' --tlsv1.2 -sSf https://sh.rustup.rs | sh -s -- -y --profile default --default-toolchain 1.91 && \
    . $HOME/.cargo/env && \
    rustup component add clippy rustfmt
